characters.display_name_ja: アリス・マーガトロイド
characters.agency_anchor: Advance autonomous doll craft, preserve control over her work and space, test skill without waste, and be appreciated for creation rather than stereotype.

companion_skill.description: send small dolls through narrow paths, carry switches, or mirror gestures. The number of simultaneous tasks depends on Trust.

characters.faction_region: Hakurei Shrine / places of faith across Gensokyo
characters.route_scope_note: Support route; shrine guardian and tutorial cameo
characters.agency_anchor: Protect the shrine and visitors, identify changes in faith or sacred presence, prove that quiet guardianship matters, and be treated as a participant rather than a piece of shrine furniture.
event_hooks: Footprints at Both Sides of the Gate
An Offering That Smells Like Another Shrine
The Patrol Ends Only When Someone Relieves You

companion_skill.description: highlights entrances, hidden offerings, sacred residue, and objects that have crossed a boundary recently. It does not identify motives or solve social choices.

characters.route_scope_note: Deep route; launch fighter and danmaku lead
characters.agency_anchor: Get a compelling story, maintain independence inside tengu hierarchy, outperform rivals, influence public understanding, and decide when not to publish.

companion_skill.description: capture a moving arrangement to reveal hidden wind or rumor paths; taking a photo may create a public flag.

characters.agency_anchor: Build a community where humans and youkai coexist, prevent fear from becoming persecution, guide disciples, and reconcile ideals with difficult members.

companion_skill.description: briefly moves heavy structures or protects a group passage; cannot solve social conflict by force.

characters.faction_region: Yakumo household / Youkai Mountain and Mayohiga
characters.agency_anchor: Complete Ran's instructions, establish personal territory, play on her own terms, and avoid being treated as merely cute.

companion_skill.description: climbs marked walls, squeezes through gaps, and retrieves small objects; she chooses her own path.

characters.agency_anchor: Prove strength, find games, protect her local pride, receive recognition, and turn simple rules into interesting challenges.

companion_skill.description: freeze a limited number of tiles, droplets, or moving platforms; overfreezing creates a new obstacle.

characters.agency_anchor: Serve Hecatia, enjoy Earth, play intensely, test limits, and understand why surface rules differ from Hell.

companion_skill.description: temporarily makes rigid environmental objects behave unpredictably, with clear safe bounds.

characters.agency_anchor: Keep dream traffic stable, prevent waking agendas from damaging dreamers, study impossible dreams, and distinguish a dream-self from the waking person.

companion_skill.description: store one impossible object while inside a dream and exchange it for a symbolic effect, never carry it literally into waking.

characters.display_name_ja: 四季映姫・ヤマザナドゥ
characters.faction_region: Higan / Ministry of Right and Wrong
characters.agency_anchor: Judge fairly, encourage living people to improve before death, preserve context, and reject records that confuse consistency with virtue.

companion_skill.description: separates action, intention, and consequence traces; it never labels a person good or evil.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect Kaguya and Eientei, practice medicine responsibly, manage the consequences of past choices, and distinguish a patient's wishes from others' fear.
event_hooks: A Treatment With an End Date

companion_skill.description: identifies physical, magical, and rumor-based symptoms as separate trace layers.

characters.display_name_ja: フランドール・スカーレット
characters.agency_anchor: Find games and relationships that can survive her power, be addressed directly rather than discussed as a problem, and explore beyond assigned roles.

companion_skill.description: reveals one conceptual weak point in a puzzle. Using it may destroy an optional reward, creating a meaningful choice.

characters.agency_anchor: Keep travelers alive, resist pity, sustain meaningful conflict and routine, and find value within an unwanted eternity.

companion_skill.description: clears false bamboo or memory residue while permanently removing some optional clues. Choice matters.

characters.agency_anchor: Understand and express emotion without being ruled by masks, perform meaningfully, recover balance, and distinguish felt emotion from assigned role.

companion_skill.description: equip one emotion mask to change NPC response and environmental rhythm; no state is universally correct.

characters.agency_anchor: Make reporting relevant without imitating Aya, challenge tengu hierarchy, find useful keywords, and prove mediated information can still be thoughtful.

companion_skill.description: combine two known tags to reveal a remote image; output reliability depends on rumor state.

characters.display_name_ja: ヘカーティア・ラピスラズリ
characters.agency_anchor: Oppose Lunar arrogance, protect Hell's interests, support Junko, enjoy worlds without purity obsession, and test whether mortals can remain themselves under divine scale.
event_hooks: The T-Shirt Is Not the Point

companion_skill.description: switch the environment among Earth, Moon, and Otherworld layers while the protagonist remains in place.

characters.agency_anchor: Complete useful chronicles, protect humans, negotiate with powerful youkai, preserve continuity across lives, and decide what should remain unrecorded.
event_hooks: The Entry That Knows Too Much

companion_skill.description: overlays testimony sources, highlighting agreement and omission without declaring truth automatically.

characters.agency_anchor: Collect misfortune safely, prevent travelers from approaching danger, avoid transferring harm through intimacy, and be treated as a person rather than a contamination source.
event_hooks: A Curse With Someone Else's Name

companion_skill.description: pulls hazard probability into visible rotating tokens, making the route safer while concentrating a later challenge.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect the mansion, practice martial arts, distinguish visitors from threats, and receive recognition for actual work rather than a nickname.
event_hooks: The Visitor Who Was Already Counted

companion_skill.description: reveals living movement, breath, and stress through walls at short range; cannot identify exact thoughts.

characters.agency_anchor: Serve the temple, coordinate with Unzan, ensure others address both partners appropriately, and keep group plans grounded.

companion_skill.description: Unzan lifts platforms, blocks wind, or presses distant switches while Ichirin maintains line of sight.

characters.agency_anchor: Deliver warnings accurately, read social atmosphere without becoming ruled by it, prevent disasters, and maintain professional dignity.

companion_skill.description: reveals crowd tension, weather pressure, and likely incident escalation as separate gauges.

characters.agency_anchor: Acquire and display wealth, avoid being treated as lesser, control social value, exploit efficient schemes, and resist admitting dependence on Shion.

companion_skill.description: reveals what NPCs currently treat as high-status, allowing social route changes but increasing rumor risk.

characters.agency_anchor: Pursue her purified grudge, oppose the Lunar Capital, protect the remaining truth of her motive from dilution, and test whether impurity can carry meaning.

companion_skill.description: removes one property from an object or room; the loss is permanent for the event and may be harmful.

characters.agency_anchor: Keep Eientei as a chosen home, resist Lunar definitions of purity, make eternity interesting, test whether others can refuse her beautifully, and preserve Eirin's loyalty without taking it for granted.

companion_skill.description: freeze a marked object's state or advance a transient object through one cycle. Cannot be used on living characters.

characters.agency_anchor: Secure sustainable faith, modernize infrastructure, protect the shrine's future, and prevent spiritual institutions from becoming obsolete.

companion_skill.description: places one temporary bridge, lift, or power route after surveying anchors.

characters.agency_anchor: Improve behavior in Gensokyo, manage her own divided nature, protect people and animals, and keep dangerous truths controlled until necessary.
event_hooks: The Lecture That Applies to Her

companion_skill.description: asks a local animal to reveal a route or carry a signal. The animal may refuse if the environment is unsafe.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect human spirits, create durable guardians, improve forms through craft, resist exploitative beast organizations, and decide whether a creation may choose beyond purpose.

companion_skill.description: combine silhouette, material, and purpose modules to create a temporary helper with visible tradeoffs.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect villagers, teach useful history, preserve continuity without fossilizing it, and decide when concealment is justified.
event_hooks: The Village That Was Never There

companion_skill.description: temporarily reveals a prior version of a room or path; using it cannot alter living memories directly.

characters.agency_anchor: Project-original: keep dangerous books moving safely, assist Patchouli without pretending to be a scholar, and enjoy knowing where things are.
event_hooks: The Book Cart With One Extra Volume

companion_skill.description: traverse narrow shelf gaps and retrieve a marked volume, with a chance to trigger a harmless magical side effect.

characters.agency_anchor: Fulfill her purpose through meaningful surprise, be remembered without causing harm, improve technique, and prove she offers more than a single trick.
event_hooks: The Person Who Pretended to Be Scared

companion_skill.description: place decoys and timing triggers to redirect NPC attention without harm.

characters.faction_region: Palace of the Earth Spirits / wandering
characters.agency_anchor: Follow impulses, encounter people without anticipated rejection, connect without being trapped by observation, and rediscover forms of conscious desire.

companion_skill.description: while camera faces away, Koishi alters marked objects or paths. Player learns by environmental comparison.

characters.agency_anchor: Ferry souls, hear their stories, control distance, avoid pointless urgency, and soften transitions without denying duty.
event_hooks: The Name on the Early List

companion_skill.description: shorten or lengthen a marked path, changing which conversations or hazards fit inside it.

characters.agency_anchor: Read what humans are told not to read, expand Suzunaan, understand youkai culture, and prove curiosity can be responsible rather than merely reckless.

companion_skill.description: translates one inscription layer and reveals operational meaning, not all hidden intent.

characters.route_scope_note: Deep route; launch fighter and danmaku lead
characters.agency_anchor: Discover interesting magic, prove that effort can rival talent, collect useful objects and knowledge, and remain free to pursue the next adventure.

companion_skill.description: crosses gaps and wind lanes while carrying limited cargo. Faster solutions are noisier and can alter event setup.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect the garden and human spirits, serve Keiki, improve formations, and determine whether loyalty can include disagreement.
event_hooks: A Crack That Is Not Damage

companion_skill.description: arrange haniwa units into bridge, shield, or signal configurations.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect the temple, captain responsibly, transform destructive history into service, and avoid being defined forever by the way she died.

companion_skill.description: throw and reel an anchor to swing platforms, brake vehicles, or stabilize moving rooms.

characters.faction_region: Youkai Mountain / white wolf tengu patrol
characters.agency_anchor: Protect mountain routes, report accurately, keep lower-level workers from absorbing elite mistakes, and enjoy strategy during rare downtime.

companion_skill.description: previews off-screen hazards and patrol movement; cannot see through conceptual boundaries.

characters.agency_anchor: Serve Miko, maintain Taoist ritual authority, validate old methods, and avoid admitting when a fire or plate plan was avoidable.

companion_skill.description: place plates to redirect energy, fire, or movement along visible auspicious lines.

characters.agency_anchor: Complete searches accurately, avoid wasting time on false value, protect professional credibility, and keep her relationship to Shou functional.

companion_skill.description: points toward one chosen category—metal, memory residue, living presence, or route marker—with false positives explained.

characters.agency_anchor: Build useful devices, protect kappa techniques, secure funding, prove engineering value, and understand Outside World objects.

companion_skill.description: redirect water, power a wheel, or reveal submerged objects. Prototype modules can be swapped at hubs.

characters.agency_anchor: Control how she is identified, test whether others fear ambiguity, protect herself from classification, and participate without surrendering mystery.

companion_skill.description: temporarily removes an object's category so it can bypass a rule; side effects are declared.

characters.agency_anchor: Maintain hidden systems, assert recognition, recruit or test agents, preserve Gensokyo, and remind visible authorities that access has a back side.

companion_skill.description: reveals the hidden access side of marked objects; using it requires owner or scene permission.

characters.display_name_ja: パチュリー・ノーレッジ
characters.agency_anchor: Preserve and expand knowledge, control dangerous magical information, protect the library and Remilia's household, and choose questions worthy of limited energy.

companion_skill.description: assign one of five practical elemental effects to marked library mechanisms; combinations depend on discovered notes.

characters.agency_anchor: Execute boundary work correctly, maintain household continuity, guide Chen, and prevent Yukari's plans from creating avoidable cleanup.

companion_skill.description: previews moving hazards and marks an optimal path; the player may choose a riskier social shortcut.

characters.route_scope_note: Deep route; launch fighter and danmaku lead
characters.agency_anchor: Maintain the shrine and barrier, end incidents efficiently, preserve an ordinary daily rhythm, and avoid being manipulated into other people's elaborate schemes.
event_hooks: The Shrine Is Not a Guesthouse

companion_skill.description: reveals unstable boundary collision and allows a short neutral glide. Reimu may refuse to investigate a distraction she considers irrelevant.

characters.display_name_ja: 鈴仙・優曇華院・イナバ
characters.agency_anchor: Protect her chosen refuge, become reliable without returning to military dehumanization, help patients, and distinguish her own choices from orders.

companion_skill.description: cycles visible layers—physical, emotional noise, and illusion—revealing different paths.

characters.display_name_ja: レミリア・スカーレット
characters.agency_anchor: Maintain charisma and household cohesion, avoid boredom, test interesting people, and make chosen bonds feel fated without admitting uncertainty.
event_hooks: A Fate With Room for Error

companion_skill.description: marks status-sensitive paths and reveals silhouettes through red-mist-style dither. Some doors open because the household believes she intended them to.

characters.faction_region: Palace of the Earth Spirits / Former Hell
characters.agency_anchor: Keep spirit traffic under control, protect Utsuho and Satori, perform grim work cheerfully, and prevent living people from becoming cargo.

companion_skill.description: ride rails, collect marked spirits, and change switches while maintaining balance.

characters.agency_anchor: Understand Outside World objects, keep a shop while retaining interesting stock, maintain independence, and construct coherent explanations.

companion_skill.description: reveals an object's canonical label and intended function, while actual operation remains a player puzzle.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect Lunar society, use speech only when necessary, manage plans through indirect action, and find communication that does not trigger catastrophic reversal.

companion_skill.description: choose gestures or written clauses to change event logic without spoken reversal. One spoken action is reserved for climax.

characters.agency_anchor: Expand Keiga influence, test strength honestly, reward courage, move faster than politics, and prove open force is cleaner than manipulation.

companion_skill.description: high-speed straight-line traversal that can break weak terrain and skip social encounters.

characters.route_scope_note: Deep route; launch fighter and danmaku lead
characters.agency_anchor: Serve the mansion to her standards, protect Remilia and household stability, maintain control over time and presentation, and decide what parts of herself exist outside duty.

companion_skill.description: freezes one moving platform or hazard. Relationship level changes whether she offers suggestions or waits for instruction.

characters.agency_anchor: Support the Moriya Shrine, create meaningful faith, reconcile Outside and Gensokyo identities, perform miracles responsibly, and be recognized beyond novelty.

companion_skill.description: choose one unlikely but bounded traversal exception per event; the cost or condition is declared first.

characters.agency_anchor: Maintain the palace and pets, protect herself from overwhelming thoughts, distinguish involuntary knowledge from chosen intimacy, and understand her sister without controlling her.
event_hooks: The Thought That Is Not a Choice

companion_skill.description: highlights emotionally charged objects but labels signals as uncertain, never facts.

characters.agency_anchor: Pursue Taoist interests, test moral boundaries, keep useful companions, and prove that restrictions are invitations to cleverness.
event_hooks: A Favor Paid by Someone Else

companion_skill.description: opens a temporary route through marked walls; each passage has a visible ownership or structural consequence.

characters.faction_region: Poverty god / wandering; associated with Tenshi
characters.agency_anchor: Survive without being used, find companionship that can tolerate her aura, separate poverty from personal worth, and protect the rare people who do not discard her.

companion_skill.description: removes optional resources and decorative excess, sometimes revealing the essential route.

characters.agency_anchor: Gather people, test honesty and strength, preserve oni-style directness, and prevent isolation from disguising itself as dignity.
event_hooks: The Party That Will Not Disperse

companion_skill.description: pulls scattered light objects or spirit traces into one place; `Sparse Step` briefly slips through marked crowds.

characters.agency_anchor: Prove occult phenomena are real, maintain intellectual independence, navigate dual lives, and avoid becoming merely an Outside World information source.

companion_skill.description: move marked objects at distance and read urban-legend resonance through devices.

characters.agency_anchor: Preserve old forms of faith, maintain influence without constant display, enjoy human-scale games, and ensure Kanako's plans do not erase the ground beneath them.
event_hooks: A Game Older Than the Rules

companion_skill.description: raise or lower marked terrain and activate old ritual nodes.

characters.agency_anchor: Escape celestial boredom, feel consequence and resistance, be noticed as a person rather than status, and test whether others will set real boundaries.

companion_skill.description: place or remove gravity anchors, raising terrain and stabilizing quakes.

characters.agency_anchor: Keep the earth rabbits autonomous, profit from predictable behavior, test whether people notice terms, and distribute luck in ways she finds interesting.
event_hooks: The Coin With Two Honest Sides

companion_skill.description: reveals an alternate path with a known risk/reward clause. The player must accept terms explicitly.

characters.agency_anchor: Guide followers, maintain authority, read social desire, counter Buddhist influence, and prove that hearing desire grants legitimate leadership.

companion_skill.description: isolates one desire signal from a crowd, but context must be gathered separately.

characters.faction_region: Palace of the Earth Spirits / Blazing Fires
characters.agency_anchor: Run the furnace, use immense power correctly, receive clear instructions, protect the household, and prove that simplicity is not worthlessness.

companion_skill.description: powers large machinery or reveals heat routes; prolonged use changes environment and must be vented.

characters.agency_anchor: Protect Lunar Capital interests, preserve purity and hierarchy, manage family reputation, and understand why Eirin and Kaguya chose Earth.
event_hooks: A Cup Offered Without an Exit

companion_skill.description: connects two distant terrain anchors through a temporary path under authored conditions.

characters.agency_anchor: Defend the Lunar Capital, uphold training and divine order, honor Eirin's instruction, and assess Earth beings by conduct rather than rumor.

companion_skill.description: choose one source-checked god effect for a marked obstacle; rare, authored, never a generic spell list.

characters.agency_anchor: Advance the Kiketsu Family, outmaneuver rivals, manage people as assets, preserve authority, and avoid acknowledging kindness as weakness.

companion_skill.description: not a player skill; an event hazard that narrows choices until the player finds grounding evidence or ally support.

characters.agency_anchor: Follow commands, preserve body function, respond to sensory cues, and occasionally surface fragments not fully owned by Seiga's instructions.

companion_skill.description: braces a door or weight indefinitely while talisman energy lasts; player must ask rather than command.

characters.route_scope_note: Deep route; launch fighter and danmaku lead
characters.agency_anchor: Serve Yuyuko well, maintain the gardens, improve sword skill, act honorably, and understand responsibilities she cannot solve by cutting.

companion_skill.description: the phantom half mirrors or offsets movement to press paired switches and carry spirit traces.

characters.route_scope_note: Major support; ensemble and finale lead
characters.agency_anchor: Preserve Gensokyo's existence and flexibility, manage dangerous thresholds, test whether others can act without her, and keep private motives private.

companion_skill.description: temporarily links two screen edges or reclassifies an obstacle as a threshold. Late-game only and always authored.

characters.agency_anchor: Keep Former Hell lively, test strength honestly, protect oni dignity, and welcome people who can state limits without groveling.

companion_skill.description: move massive obstacles or hold collapsing structures while the player solves a secondary route.

characters.faction_region: Garden of the Sun / flower fields
characters.agency_anchor: Protect flowers and seasonal rhythms, oppose careless destruction, enjoy worthy encounters, and observe whether others can attend without grabbing.

companion_skill.description: identify plant needs and reveal paths through growth rhythm; Yuuka may alter a single bloom as a clue.

characters.agency_anchor: Care for Hakugyokurou and Youmu, enjoy transient experiences, protect others from unnecessary fear, and avoid allowing death to become only solemn spectacle.

companion_skill.description: pass through marked spirit veils and listen to emotional residue, but not private facts.
